CREATE table [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t] 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS 
select
    indicates, code, description, maternal
from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_cons_t]
where indicates in ('birth', 'death');
GO

CREATE TABLE [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS select t.code, t.description, cast(null as varchar(1)) as suppression
from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_codes_t] t
where code in ('A0225', 'A4281', 'A4282', 'A4283', 'A4284', 'A4285', 'A4286', 'E0602', 'E0603', 'E0604', 'G0064', 'G9356', 'G9357', 'G9358', 'G9361', 'G9779', 'K1005', 'S3620', 'S8415', 'S9212',
'S9436', 'S9437', 'S9438', 'S9439', 'S9442', 'S9443', 'G9256', 'G9260', 'G9262', 'G9267', 'G9403', 'G9406', 'G9433', 'G9751', 'G9812', 'G9814', 'G9816', 'G9846', 'G9847', 'G9848', 'G9849', 'G9850',
'G9851', 'G9852', 'G9853', 'G9854', 'G9855', 'G9859', 'M1060', 'S2053', 'S2054', 'S2055', 'S2065', 'Q9001', 'Q9002', 'Q9003', 'Q9004', 'E0301', 'E0302', 'E0303', 'E0304', 'E0911', 'E0912', 'E1035',
'E1036', 'E1038', 'E1039', 'K0006', 'K0007', 'K0800', 'K0801', 'K0802', 'K0806', 'K0807', 'K0808', 'K0813', 'K0814', 'K0815', 'K0816', 'K0820', 'K0821', 'K0822', 'K0823', 'K0824', 'K0825', 'K0826',

drop TABLE [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_cons_t];
GO

CREATE TABLE [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_cons_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Other conditions originating in the perinatal period (including birth trauma)' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (try_cast(substring(code, 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or code = '7616')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'P%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Liveborn infants according to type of birth' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'V3%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (code like 'Z37%' or code like 'Z38%')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Unknown cause of death' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (code like '798%' or code = '799' or code = '7999'))
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code = 'R99'))
union all
select type, code, icd_version, 'Loss of consciousness of any duration with death' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (code like 'S06%7A' or code like 'S06%8A')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Operations of war' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E99%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y36%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Military operations' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y37%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Legal intervention' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E97%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y35%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Terrorism' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y38%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Assault/Homicide' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E96%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' 
      and substring(code, 1, 3) in ('X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Suicide' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E95%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Prolonged stay in weightlessness' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code = 'E9280')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'X52%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Drowning' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E910%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' 
      and substring(code, 1, 3) in ('W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Suffocation' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E913%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Vehicle accident' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and substring(code, 1, 3) in ('E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84'))
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'V%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Detailed Codes representing BMI over 40' as reason, 
  case when icd_version = '9' then 'V8541' else 'Z6841' end as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('V8541', 'V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554'))
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('Z684', 'Z6841', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Problems related to living in residential institution' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('Z593')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Imprisonment and other incarceration' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('Z651')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Severe obesity caused by excess calories' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('E6601')
union all 
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'birth' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '9' and type = 'Procedure' and code in ('670', '720', '721', '7221', '7229', '7231', '7239', '724', '7251', '7252', '7253', '7254', '726', '7271', '7279', '728', '729', '7301', '731', '7322', '734', '7351', '7359', '736', '7391', '7392', '7393', '7394', '7399', '740', '741', '742', '744', '7499', '7531', '7535', '755', '7550', '7551', '7552', '756', '7561', '7562', '7569', '757', '759', '7591', '7592', '7593', '7594', '7594', '7599', '8916')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'birth' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Procedure' and code in ('0U7C0DZ', '0U7C0ZZ', '0U7C3DZ', '0U7C3ZZ', '0U7C4DZ', '0U7C4ZZ', '0U7C7DZ', '0U7C7ZZ', '0U7C8DZ', '0U7C8ZZ', '0W8NXZZ', '10D00Z0', '10D00Z1', '10D07Z3', '10D07Z4', '10D07Z5', '10D07Z6', '10D07Z7', '10D07Z8', '10E0XZZ', '10J00ZZ', '10J03ZZ', '10J04ZZ', '10J07ZZ', '10J08ZZ', '10J0XZZ');
GO



drop TABLE [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t];
GO

CREATE TABLE [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Other conditions originating in the perinatal period (including birth trauma)' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (try_cast(substring(code, 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or code = '7616')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'P%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Liveborn infants according to type of birth' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'V3%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (code like 'Z37%' or code like 'Z38%')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Unknown cause of death' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (code like '798%' or code = '799' or code = '7999'))
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code = 'R99'))
union all
select type, code, icd_version, 'Loss of consciousness of any duration with death' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and (code like 'S06%7A' or code like 'S06%8A')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Operations of war' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E99%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y36%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Military operations' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y37%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Legal intervention' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E97%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y35%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Terrorism' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'Y38%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Assault/Homicide' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E96%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' 
      and substring(code, 1, 3) in ('X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Suicide' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E95%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Prolonged stay in weightlessness' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code = 'E9280')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'X52%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Drowning' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E910%')
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' 
      and substring(code, 1, 3) in ('W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Suffocation' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  (icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'E913%')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Vehicle accident' as reason, null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and substring(code, 1, 3) in ('E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84'))
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code like 'V%'))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Detailed Codes representing BMI over 40' as reason, 
  case when icd_version = '9' then 'V8541' else 'Z6841' end as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  ((icd_version = '9' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('V8541', 'V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554'))
  or (icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('Z684', 'Z6841', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')))
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Imprisonment and other incarceration' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('Z651')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'Severe obesity caused by excess calories' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Diagnosis' and code in ('E6601')
union all 
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'birth' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '9' and type = 'Procedure' and code in ('670', '720', '721', '7221', '7229', '7231', '7239', '724', '7251', '7252', '7253', '7254', '726', '7271', '7279', '728', '729', '7301', '731', '7322', '734', '7351', '7359', '736', '7391', '7392', '7393', '7394', '7399', '740', '741', '742', '744', '7499', '7531', '7535', '755', '7550', '7551', '7552', '756', '7561', '7562', '7569', '757', '759', '7591', '7592', '7593', '7594', '7594', '7599', '8916')
union all
select 
  type, code, icd_version, 'birth' as reason, 
  null as suppression 
from 
  [dim].[icd_codes_t]
where 
  icd_version = '10' and type = 'Procedure' and code in ('0U7C0DZ', '0U7C0ZZ', '0U7C3DZ', '0U7C3ZZ', '0U7C4DZ', '0U7C4ZZ', '0U7C7DZ', '0U7C7ZZ', '0U7C8DZ', '0U7C8ZZ', '0W8NXZZ', '10D00Z0', '10D00Z1', '10D07Z3', '10D07Z4', '10D07Z5', '10D07Z6', '10D07Z7', '10D07Z8', '10E0XZZ', '10J00ZZ', '10J03ZZ', '10J04ZZ', '10J07ZZ', '10J08ZZ', '10J0XZZ');
GO




CREATE TABLE [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS select *
from [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_cons_t]
where code in ('05',
'06',
'07',
'08',
'26',
'25',
'09');
GO




CREATE TABLE [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS SELECT 
    [Indicates]
    ,[Code]
    ,[Description]
    ,[Maternal]
    ,[Transformation]
FROM 
    [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_cons_t]
where 
    [Indicates] in ('birth', 'death', 'veteran', 'imprisonment');
GO





CREATE TABLE [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS select *
from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_cons_t]
where indicates in ('birth');
GO





CREATE TABLE [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS select
  zip3, case when a.gender = 'male' then 'M' when a.gender = 'female' then 'F' else null end as gender, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, sum(population) as population
from
(
  SELECT
  substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3, 
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_Under_5_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    0 AS age_lower_bound,
    4 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
  substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3, 
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_5_to_9_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    5 AS age_lower_bound,
    9 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_10_to_14_years  as population,
    'female' as gender,
    10 AS age_lower_bound,
    14 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_15_to_19_years  as population,
    'female' as gender,
    15 AS age_lower_bound,
    19 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_20_to_24_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    20 AS age_lower_bound,
    24 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_25_to_29_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    25 AS age_lower_bound,
    29 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_30_to_34_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    30 AS age_lower_bound,
    34 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_35_to_39_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    35 AS age_lower_bound,
    39 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_40_to_44_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    40 AS age_lower_bound,
    44 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]  
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_45_to_49_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    45 AS age_lower_bound,
    49 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_50_to_54_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    50 AS age_lower_bound,
    54 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]  
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_55_to_59_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    55 AS age_lower_bound,
    59 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_60_to_64_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    60 AS age_lower_bound,
    64 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]  
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_65_to_69_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    65 AS age_lower_bound,
    69 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_70_to_74_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    70 AS age_lower_bound,
    74 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_75_to_79_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    75 AS age_lower_bound,
    79 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_80_to_84_years as population,
    'female' as gender,
    80 AS age_lower_bound,
    84 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_female_Total_population_AGE_85_years_and_over as population,
    'female' as gender,
    85 AS age_lower_bound,
    150 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3, 
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_Under_5_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    0 AS age_lower_bound,
    4 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
  substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3, 
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_5_to_9_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    5 AS age_lower_bound,
    9 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL

    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_10_to_14_years  as population,
    'male' as gender,
    10 AS age_lower_bound,
    14 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_15_to_19_years  as population,
    'male' as gender,
    15 AS age_lower_bound,
    19 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_20_to_24_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    20 AS age_lower_bound,
    24 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_25_to_29_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    25 AS age_lower_bound,
    29 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_30_to_34_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    30 AS age_lower_bound,
    34 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_35_to_39_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    35 AS age_lower_bound,
    39 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_40_to_44_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    40 AS age_lower_bound,
    44 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]  
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_45_to_49_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    45 AS age_lower_bound,
    49 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_50_to_54_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    50 AS age_lower_bound,
    54 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]  
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_55_to_59_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    55 AS age_lower_bound,
    59 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_60_to_64_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    60 AS age_lower_bound,
    64 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]  
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_65_to_69_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    65 AS age_lower_bound,
    69 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_70_to_74_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    70 AS age_lower_bound,
    74 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_75_to_79_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    75 AS age_lower_bound,
    79 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t]
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_Male_Total_population_AGE_80_to_84_years as population,
    'male' as gender,
    80 AS age_lower_bound,
    84 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
    substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 3) as zip3,
    Estimate_male_Total_population_AGE_85_years_and_over as population,
    'male' as gender,
    85 AS age_lower_bound,
    150 AS age_upper_bound
  FROM
    [dim].[census_population_by_zip_age_gender_t] 
) a
group by
  zip3, case when a.gender = 'male' then 'M' when a.gender = 'female' then 'F' else null end, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound;
GO
